growth_records.agit: 300 rpm (stir bar) for monoculture growth curves; Hungate tubes otherwise
growth_records.cite: Pau Pérez Escriva et al. Distinct N and C Cross-Feeding Networks in a Synthetic Mouse Gut Consortium. mSystems (2022). DOI:10.1128/msystems.01484-21. [PMC9040589]
growth_records.snippet: Table 1: Clostridium clostridioforme YL32 (Firmicutes), Max OD 1.74, Mean μ ± SD 0.54 ± 0.02.
growth_records.notes: μ=0.54 h^-1 (±0.02) reported. td = ln2/μ = 0.6931/0.54 = 1.284 h. Max OD600 = 1.74. Cysteine supplementation had a drastic negative impact; xanthine improved max OD ~10-20% (Fig 4A).
